'''Raije''' was a [[ZeHethbra]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was known to carry a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]], which he is said to have claimed from his very first target.

He once attempted to find the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Brinaloy N'Vaari]] in [[Le Yer]] on [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] with the mission to kill her. His employer was a rival of the Le Yer gangsters [[Malkoi]] and [[A'jidre Skrigatov]].

==Appearances==
